run_idle_timeout.semantics: The run has no ordinary wall-clock deadline. Sustained model, tool, input, memory, session, or child-run activity refreshes the idle deadline; zero disables this idle guard.

max_turns_per_run.semantics: Each run has an independent cap on model turns so an active tool loop cannot continue without bound.

terminal_timeout.semantics: Foreground terminal commands have an independent execution timeout. An explicit timeout_ms overrides the default; background commands do not inherit it.
